title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Puravankara

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Puravankara
jsonLd.description:
We at Puravankara are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Puravankara:
Puravankara is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puravankara!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
